mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where Your Every Wish is Our Command!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into my Bank of Entitlement branch with a sudden craving for a gourmet lunch. I casually mentioned this to the teller, expecting nothing but the usual polite nod. But to my astonishment, within minutes, a team of chefs arrived with a spread fit for a king, right there in the bank lobby! I may have just wanted a snack, but who am I to deny the lavish feast they had so generously provided? And of course, I made sure to graciously enjoy every last bite, because when you're as important as I am, a meal should always come to you, never the other way around. And isn't that the true meaning of customer service?
